descriptions.text: Pokémon Emerald Kaizo is a super-hard mode romhack of Pokémon Emerald and the official sequel of Pokemon Blue Kaizo & Pokemon Crystal Kaizo . These titles were inspired by Kaizo Mario World, though the game's difficulty was inspired by Drayano60's Firered Omega, as well as Pokémon Stadium.

Pokémon is a widely popular media franchise, spurring the production of unofficial fan-made games in the Pokémon shared universe. These range from modifications of pre-existing games to larger, full-scale games. Fan-made projects have garnered a large following and strong subcommunity in the Pokémon fandom, and many projects have faced legal issues from Pokémon's parent companies The Pokémon Company and Nintendo.
